exceptionPending.title: Features Being Activated
exceptionPending.desc: You have not activated the corresponding product. This feature is currently unavailable. Please contact your administrator.

httpMsg.forbidden: Access to this resource is forbidden
httpMsg.notFound: The requested resource does not exist
httpMsg.requestTimeout: Request timeout, please try again later
httpMsg.internalServerError: Internal server error, please try again later
httpMsg.badGateway: Bad gateway error, please try again later
httpMsg.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable, please try again later
httpMsg.gatewayTimeout: Gateway timeout, please try again later
httpMsg.networkError: Network connection error, please check your connection

common.logOutTips: Do you want to log out?

leftView.title: Cross-border payment intelligent SaaS solution
leftView.subTitle: Provides a one-stop cross-border payment solution to help businesses achieve convenient, secure, and reliable cross-border payments.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subTitle: Enter your mobile / email and password to login
login.errorContent: Incorrect password (attempt {tryCount}). Please complete the verification and try again.

frozen.title: Account Frozen
frozen.message: To protect your account security, the login function has been temporarily frozen.
frozen.alertContent: We have sent a security notification to your registered email/phone.

security.title: Security Verification
security.subTitle: To ensure the security of your account, please enter the verification code
security.verifyCodeWillSentTo: Verification code will be sent to
security.loginAndAuthDesc: Global authentication settings, applies to all merchants
security.setAsDefaultDesc: Use {type} as default verification when logging in
security.newPasswordRule: At least 8 characters, including letters, numbers, and special characters
security.loginPasswordDesc: Login password, used for password login
security.paymentPINDesc: 6-digit PIN, used for quick verification of fund operations, without waiting for a verification code
security.paymentPINNote: After setting, you can use the PIN to verify fund operations (exchange, payment, card recharge, etc.) in Self mode.
security.paymentPINNote2: When not set, it will fallback to SMS/email verification code. Not applicable in Designated mode.
security.designatedPhoneDesc: MID Level – Editable by Account Holder only · Current: ABC Trading / MID-001
security.designatedPhoneNote: When the role verification method is set to Designated, the verification code for fund operations will be sent to this phone number.
security.designatedPhoneNote2: It can be your own phone number or the phone number of the designated security officer.
security.googleStep1: Step 1: Scan the QR code with your Authenticator App
security.googleStep2: Enter the 6-digit code displayed on your Authenticator App
security.googleNote: Can't scan? Enter the secret key manually
security.regenerateKeyNote: Regenerating the key will require re-scanning the QR code for binding
security.sendVerifyCode: Send verification code to the bound phone number
security.sendVerifyCodeToEmail: Send verification code to the bound email
security.setPaymentPINDesc: Set a 6-digit PIN for quick verification of fund operations
security.confirmPaymentPINNote: Passwords do not match, please re-enter
security.paymentPINError: Cannot be sequential or repeated numbers
security.designatedPhoneNote3: Designated mode - transaction verification code will be sent to this phone number.
security.newPaymentPINSame: New password cannot be the same as the original password

forgetPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgetPassword.subTitle: Enter your email to reset your password
forgetPassword.step1SubTitle: Input your registered email or phone number, we will send a verification code
forgetPassword.accountPlaceholder: Please enter your email or phone number
forgetPassword.codeHint: Verification code has been sent to
forgetPassword.validFor10Min: Verification code is valid for 10 minutes
forgetPassword.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been successfully reset, please login with your new password
forgetPassword.invalidAccountFormat: Please enter a valid email or phone number
forgetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

register.title: Create account
register.subTitle: Welcome to join us, please fill in the following information to complete the registration
rule: The password length cannot be less than 6 digits
Please agree to the privacy policy
register.registerWithVerifyCode: Register with verification code, no need to set password
register.readAndAgreeText: I have read and agree to
register.passwordRule: At least 8 characters, including letters, numbers, and special characters
register.invalidEmailFormat: Please enter a valid email address
register.invalidPhoneNumberFormat: Please enter a valid phone number
register.pleaseAgreePrivacyPolicy: Please agree to the privacy policy
register.passwordStrengthInsufficient: Password strength is insufficient, please meet all rules
register.registerSuccessDesc: Account created, you can log in and activate products

exceptionPage.403: Sorry, you do not have permission to access this page
exceptionPage.404: Sorry, the page you are trying to access does not exist
exceptionPage.500: Sorry, there was an error on the server

entityProfile.title: Set up your entity profile
entityProfile.subtitle: Tell us about your business entity so we can show you the products available in your jurisdiction.

productSelection.title: Choose products to activate
productSelection.subtitle: Select a product to activate. You will be redirected to our verification partner to submit required information.
productSelection.emptyHint: Please select your country/region and entity type above to view the products available for your business.

productApplication.pageDesc: Select your entity details and choose products to activate.

common.noApplyUrl: KYC link is not available, please contact support.

submitted.title: Application Submitted Successfully!
submitted.desc: Your information has been submitted to our verification partner. Review will begin shortly.
submitted.infoLine1: Your submitted documents will be reviewed (1-3 business days).
submitted.infoLine2: You will receive an email notification when the review is complete.
submitted.infoLine3: Once approved, products are activated automatically.
submitted.timelineSubmittedDesc: Information collected via SumSub verification portal.

underReview.title: Application Under Review
underReview.desc: Your application is being reviewed. This typically takes 1-3 business days.

approved.title: Application Approved!
approved.desc: Congratulations! Your application has been approved. Your products are now activated and ready to use.
approved.infoLine1: Access your dashboard with full product features.
approved.infoLine4: Integrate via API using your developer credentials.

rejected.title: Application Rejected
rejected.desc: Unfortunately, your application could not be approved at this time. Please review the reasons below.

needInfo.title: Additional Information Required
needInfo.desc: Additional documents are needed to proceed. Please provide the requested materials.
needInfo.alertDesc: Please supplement the following materials within 14 business days. Failure to respond may result in application rejection.
needInfo.supplementHint: You will be redirected to our verification partner to upload supplementary documents.
needInfo.noApplyUrl: KYC link is not available, please contact support.

rolesPermissions.subtitle: Manage roles, configure permissions, and invite and manage users
rolesPermissions.modelLayer: Two-layer permissions: Layer 1 — page access (which modules are visible); Layer 2 — operation level (view-only / can operate). Account Holders have full access by default. When a user has multiple roles, permissions are merged.
rolesPermissions.roleNamePlaceholder: e.g. Finance lead, Ops specialist, Card admin…
rolesPermissions.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Manages funds and deposit/withdraw operations
rolesPermissions.modulePermissionsHint: Choose modules this role can access and select operations per module (multi-select).
rolesPermissions.verificationHintRole: This role can operate transaction modules. Choose how verification codes are sent for fund operations.
rolesPermissions.verificationSelf: Self — code sent to the operator
rolesPermissions.verificationDesignated: Designated — code sent to a designated secure phone
rolesPermissions.combinedPermissionsHint: Merged result of all roles (pages union; operations use the highest level).
rolesPermissions.userActionsHint: Suspend keeps data and roles. Remove clears roles and cannot be undone. Re-invite removed users.
rolesPermissions.inviteIntro: The invitee will receive an invitation notification.
rolesPermissions.inviteFirstNamePlaceholder: Please enter the invitee's user name
rolesPermissions.inviteTipEmail1: The link is valid for 7 days and can be used once.
rolesPermissions.inviteTipEmail3: Registered → log in and accept the invite (User).
rolesPermissions.inviteTipEmail4: The email link verifies ownership; no extra code is required.
rolesPermissions.inviteTipPhone1: SMS can be received on the phone; accepting the invite must be done on MP (Web).
rolesPermissions.inviteTipPhone2: Not registered → sign up on MP with this phone and log in.
rolesPermissions.inviteTipPhone3: Registered → log in on MP; pending invites appear in the notification center.
rolesPermissions.inviteTipPhone4: Accepting requires an SMS code to confirm phone ownership.
rolesPermissions.inviteTipPhone5: SMS may be intercepted; an extra code improves security. Mobile-only acceptance is not supported in this release.
rolesPermissions.editRolesDialogDesc: Toggle roles for this user. Permissions update after save.
rolesPermissions.editRolesDialogHint: Multiple roles: page permissions union; operations use the highest level (operate > view-only).

msg.selectOneModule: Select at least one module with permissions
msg.cannotDeleteRole: Cannot delete: {count} user(s) still have this role. Remove or reassign them first.
msg.deleteRoleConfirm: Delete role "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
msg.enterFirstName: Please enter the invitee's first name
msg.holderOnlyOperate: Only the account holder can perform this action
msg.selectOneRole: Please select at least one role
msg.inviteSent: Invitation sent to {contact}. Link valid for 7 days.
msg.removeUserConfirm: Remove {name} from {merchant}? Roles will be cleared. This cannot be undone.

activate.subSet: Welcome! Set your password to complete account activation.
activate.subDone: Your password has been set successfully. You can now sign in to EX Merchant Portal.
activate.subDoneRegister: You have completed registration. You can now sign in to EX Merchant Portal.
activate.subSetHasUserId: Your account is ready. Tap the button below to complete registration.

expired.title: Activation Link Expired
expired.sub: This activation link has expired. Links are valid for 24 hours after being sent.
expired.alert: To receive a new activation link, please contact your EX account representative or request a resend from your portal administrator.
expired.requestSuccess: New activation email has been requested

alreadyActivated.title: Account Activated!
alreadyActivated.sub: This account has already been activated. You can sign in directly.
alreadyActivated.alert: If you're having trouble signing in, please contact support for assistance.

error.title: Something Went Wrong
error.sub: We encountered an issue while processing your request. Please try again later.
error.alert: If this problem persists, please contact our support team for assistance.

withdraw.title: Withdraw
withdraw.addressModalNotice: The withdrawal address must be verified before use. Please make sure all information is correct.
withdraw.networkSelectionHint: Select the network your address belongs to
withdraw.networkWarning: Selecting the wrong network for transfers will result in permanent loss of assets.
withdraw.universalAddressDesc: Check this to ensure the address supports all tokens on the selected network
withdraw.addressWarning: The withdrawal address must be verified before use. Please make sure all information is correct.
withdraw.addressPlaceholder: Please double-check the address. An incorrect address may result in permanent loss of funds.
withdraw.aliasPlaceholder: A friendly name to identify this address
withdraw.addressMinLength: Address length cannot be less than 26 characters
withdraw.coinRequired: Please select at least one coin
withdraw.pasteWarning: Cannot access clipboard, please paste manually
withdraw.pasteNotSupported: Browser does not support auto paste, please paste manually
withdraw.selectCoinWarning: Please select at least one coin
withdraw.submitSuccess: Withdrawal request submitted, please wait for processing
withdraw.processingTimeDesc: Withdrawal processing takes approximately 4 hours. Please note that processing time may be extended due to unexpected circumstances.
withdraw.warningDesc: Do not transact with sanctioned entities.
withdraw.telegramDesc: Or contact us via Telegram: https://t.me/blancblock
withdraw.amountInvalid: Please enter a valid numeric amount
withdraw.amountMustPositive: Withdraw amount must be greater than 0
withdraw.amountExceedsBalance: Withdraw amount cannot exceed available balance
withdraw.amountTooSmall: Withdrawal amount cannot be less than {min}
withdraw.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid withdrawal amount
withdraw.feeCalculationFailed: Fee calculation failed, please try again

processing.title: Processing Time:
processing.desc: Withdrawal processing takes up to 4 hours. Please be aware that processing times may be extended due to unforeseen circumstances.

warning.title: Warning:
warning.desc: Do not engage in any fund transfers with sanctioned entities or high-risk countries/regions. Violations will trigger a compliance freeze.

delete.title: Delete Address
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

wallets.title: Assets
wallets.desc: Fiat accounts and crypto wallets used for acceptance, OTC trading and settlement.

deposit.title: Deposit
deposit.warning: Transfer strictly according to the selected currency and network to the specified address. Please use a small test transfer for the first deposit. Transferring to the wrong network may result in permanent loss of assets. If you have any questions, please contact us.
deposit.warning1: Please ensure the network you select matches the network supported by the sending wallet. Selecting the wrong network may result in permanent loss of assets.
deposit.warning2: Minimum deposit amount is {amount} {currency}. Deposits below the minimum amount will not be credited.
deposit.warning3: Deposit confirmation time is usually 1-3 network confirmations, depending on network congestion.
deposit.warningShare: Do not share your address information with others.
deposit.notice1: Please ensure the network you select matches the network supported by the sending wallet. Selecting the wrong network may result in permanent loss of assets.
deposit.notice2: The deposit address only supports digital assets of the corresponding network. Do not deposit other currencies or network assets to this address.
deposit.notice3: Deposit confirmation requires network confirmation, please be patient. The arrival time depends on network congestion.
deposit.notice4: Please save the deposit address, you can reuse this address for deposits.

network.title: Network Requirements:
network.desc: Only send the selected crypto asset via the correct network (ERC-20 for Ethereum, TRC-20 for TRON). Cross-network transfers will result in permanent fund loss.

address.title: Address Verification:
address.desc: Double-check the deposit address before sending. Incorrect addresses or smart contract transfers are not supported and will cause permanent loss.

confirmation.title: Confirmation Time:
confirmation.desc: ERC-20 requires 64 confirmations (~20-30 min) and 19 confirmations (~1-2 min) for TRC-20.

transactions.title: Records
transactions.noDataDesc: No records found for the selected filters.
